issues.description: Action type 'GiveDon' is incorrect. 'Set up to 4 of your DON!! cards as active' means activating existing DON cards, not giving new ones. Should use 'AttachDon' or a DON activation action. Current DSL gives DON instead of activating them.

Action type 'PlayFromHand' with restriction is incorrect. The card text states a restriction/prevention: 'you cannot play Character cards with a base cost of 7 or more during this turn.' This is a conditional restriction on gameplay, not an action that plays cards. This should be represented as a condition/constraint on the player's available actions, not as a PlayFromHand action.
Missing duration field. The restriction 'during this turn' indicates a temporary effect that lasts until end of turn. Should have duration:'DuringYourTurn' or appropriate turn-limited duration.
